user_prompt: Cinematic wedding reel, slow and emotional, warm tones

intent.raw_prompt: Cinematic wedding reel, slow and emotional, warm tones
intent.rationale: The prompt explicitly asks for a 'slow and emotional' 'cinematic wedding reel', guiding these choices. A 'crossfade' transition and 'romantic' music mood enhance the emotional, cinematic feel, with a 45-second duration being appropriate for a short reel.

image_analyses: file_name='img1.jpg' description='A cinematic, full-body shot of a South Asian bride and groom standing outdoors, looking at each other affectionately in their elaborate wedding attire, with a soft, natural background of trees and foliage.' detected_subjects=['Bride', 'Groom', 'Wedding attire'] dominant_colors=['Cream', 'Gold', 'Light Green', 'Pink', 'Dark Green', 'Brown'] estimated_emotion='Joy, Love, Affection, Serenity' composition_quality=0.9 suggested_role='Opening'

file_name='img2.jpg' description="A close-up cinematic shot of a South Asian groom tenderly kissing his bride's forehead, both smiling with eyes closed in a moment of profound love and intimacy, set against a blurred green background." detected_subjects=['Bride', 'Groom'] dominant_colors=['Cream', 'Gold', 'Light Green', 'Pink', 'Dark Green'] estimated_emotion='Love, Tenderness, Joy, Intimacy' composition_quality=0.95 suggested_role='Climax'

file_name='img3.jpg' description="A cinematic, mid-shot of a South Asian groom tenderly kissing his bride's forehead, both smiling with eyes closed, surrounded by the natural, softly lit outdoor environment." detected_subjects=['Bride', 'Groom', 'Wedding attire'] dominant_colors=['Cream', 'Gold', 'Light Green', 'Pink', 'Dark Green', 'Brown'] estimated_emotion='Love, Tenderness, Joy, Intimacy' composition_quality=0.9 suggested_role='Climax'

file_name='img4.jpg' description='A young girl in a bright pink and yellow outfit practices golf putting on a sunny, green golf course, with an adult mentor observing her patiently in the background under a clear blue sky.' detected_subjects=['Young girl', 'Adult mentor', 'Golf club', 'Golf balls', 'Golf course'] dominant_colors=['Green', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink'] estimated_emotion='Concentration, Learning, Support, Determination' composition_quality=0.8 suggested_role='Filler'

file_name='img5.jpg' description='Two male golfers, one in a light green shirt and the other in blue, are seen loading golf bags onto a golf cart on a bright, sunny day, with a rustic building in the background.' detected_subjects=['Golfer 1', 'Golfer 2', 'Golf cart', 'Golf bags'] dominant_colors=['Green', 'Blue', 'White', 'Brown', 'Black'] estimated_emotion='Preparation, Anticipation, Casual' composition_quality=0.75 suggested_role='Opening'

file_name='img6.jpg' description='An expansive cinematic shot of multiple golfers carrying their bags as they walk across a vast, lush green golf course under a clear blue sky, with a line of trees in the distance.' detected_subjects=['Multiple golfers', 'Golf bags', 'Golf course', 'Trees'] dominant_colors=['Green', 'Blue', 'White'] estimated_emotion='Serenity, Leisure, Activity, Openness' composition_quality=0.85 suggested_role='Opening'

file_name='img7.jpg' description='Two men playing pickleball on an outdoor court at night, with the player in the foreground poised to strike the ball, lit by bright court lights and a vibrant orange backdrop.' detected_subjects=['Pickleball player 1', 'Pickleball player 2', 'Pickleball court', 'Rackets'] dominant_colors=['Blue', 'Orange', 'Black', 'Green', 'White'] estimated_emotion='Action, Focus, Energy, Competition' composition_quality=0.7 suggested_role='Filler'

file_name='img8.jpg' description='Two men engaged in a game of pickleball on an illuminated outdoor court at night, one player reaching out with his racket, ready for the shot, with a colorful branded banner in the background.' detected_subjects=['Pickleball player 1', 'Pickleball player 2', 'Pickleball court', 'Rackets'] dominant_colors=['Blue', 'Orange', 'Black', 'Green', 'White'] estimated_emotion='Action, Focus, Energy, Competition' composition_quality=0.7 suggested_role='Filler'

storyboard.narrative_arc: initial tenderness -> intimate moment -> profound love
storyboard.style_notes: All transitions are crossfades to maintain a cinematic, emotional flow, as per preference and style guide. Scenes hold for 6 seconds each to ensure slow pacing, allowing moments to breathe. Captions are short, poetic fragments, avoiding exclamation marks. Camera effects use slow zoom-ins for an intimate, Ken Burns effect. The total duration is shorter than the target due to the limited number of high-quality, relevant images suitable for the requested cinematic, emotional wedding reel; focus was placed on narrative coherence and quality over hitting the exact target duration with unsuitable content.
